productDisplayName: Lee Men Henry Red Check Shirt
description: Composition Red, blue and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, short sleeves with stitched detailing on the cuffs, pocket on the left chest with brand name embroidered above the pocket and has a curved hem Wash care Machine wash with mild detergent in warm water; wash dark colours separately Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach, wring or dry clean Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade This shirt from lee is crafted from soft cotton fabric. Team it with crisp chinos and leather shoes or jeans and sneakers. For a casual vibe, wear a basic tee inside, slip into your favourite jeans and casual shoes! Size and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
